title: BSP Events
description: Schema for domain events published by BSP-compliant services (io.bsp.agents.events).

event.description: An immutable domain event published by an BSP-compliant service as the result of processing a command. CloudEvent 1.0 envelope — the type field identifies the domain fact (e.g. CounterProposed, OrderSubmitted), and source identifies the service that published it.

eventList.description: Response body for GET /events. Lists domain events published by this service, with optional cursor for pagination.

nextCursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor. Present when more results exist beyond the current page. Pass as ?after= in the next request. Absent when this is the last page.

subscriptionRegistration.description: Request body for POST /subscriptions. Registers a webhook to receive push event delivery.

serviceId.description: Identifier of a registered service (from POST /services) that owns this subscription. When present, the subscription is lifecycle-coupled to the service — deleting the service via DELETE /services/{id} will also remove this subscription.

webhook.description: Callback configuration for push event delivery.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive events as CloudEvents (HTTP binding).

secret.description: HMAC secret for payload signing. Write-only — accepted on registration, never returned in read responses.

filter.description: Optional filter to limit delivery to specific event types. Omit to receive all events.

types.description: CloudEvent type strings (PascalCase) to filter delivery by.

subscriptionDescriptor.description: Response body for POST /subscriptions and GET /subscriptions/{id}. The secret field is omitted.

serviceId.description: Identifier of the owning service, if this subscription is service-linked.
